name: system-prompt-curator
description: Curate production-grade system prompts for autonomous coding agents

interface.shortDescription: Design and improve autonomous agent prompts
interface.longDescription: System Prompt Curator helps agents create and refine system prompts with task-matched identity, phased workflows, explicit tools, evidence-based completion criteria, and realistic error-recovery examples.
defaultPrompt: Create a system prompt for this agent
Review this prompt for completion gaps
